content: Self-Refine's iterative single-model refinement framework can be augmented by LLM self-reflection mechanisms that draw on multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives to create a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement loop that still retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervised data. This combined framework would avoid the common pitfall of single-perspective self-refinement where the LLM reinforces its own blind spots instead of correcting them.
